v19_coverage_profile_note: E38 coverage profile is the most concentrated yet under v18/v19 anchor-local sampling. distinct_slots_hit = 5 (vs E37's 7); Gini = 0.60 (vs E37's 0.45). The concentration reflects the 13-anchor expert path's slot distribution: 12 anchors in {S14, S15, S16, S20, S07}; 0 discovery candidates squeeze out non-anchor slots. v19's learned verifier preserves this concentration (no slot-axis penalty). The narrowness is rewarded by v18/v19's anchor-yield-rate metric (each yielding anchor contributes +0.7) and is intentional under the local-exploration thesis.
